title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
